case_title: BITTON, LAZARE H. vs. BRANNAN MEAT COMPANY, CA/CO DBA CALIFORNIA MEAT CO

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BITTON, LAZARE H.
REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BITTON, LAZARE H. AS TO DEFENDANT BRANNAN MEAT COMPANY, CA/CO DBA CALIFORNIA MEAT CO
